title: Morphy: The Opera Game (1858)
description: Paul Morphy's immortal miniature against the Duke of Brunswick and Count Isouard — a model of rapid development and open lines. Bundled offline.

title: Anderssen: The Immortal Game (1851)
description: Adolf Anderssen's King's Gambit brilliancy versus Kieseritzky, sacrificing both rooks and the queen for mate. Bundled offline.

title: World Chess Championships
description: Games from the classical World Championship matches — Steinitz through the modern title bouts.

title: Bobby Fischer — Collected Games
description: The collected tournament and match games of the eleventh World Champion, Robert James Fischer.

title: Garry Kasparov — Collected Games
description: The collected games of the thirteenth World Champion, Garry Kasparov.

title: Paul Morphy — Collected Games
description: The collected games of Paul Morphy, the unofficial world's strongest player of the 1850s.
